description.value: Aura faint evocation [evil]; CL 5th; Slot none; Price 800 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION A character who drinks a dose of this black, bubbling ichor becomes nauseated for 1d6 rounds if he fails a DC 15 Fortitude save. He also gains an enhanced capacity to affect demons with his magical attacks for 1 hourâduring this time, demons suffer a â2 penalty on their saving throws against the userâs spells and spell-like abilities, and the user gains a +2 bonus on caster level checks made to penetrate a demonâs spell resistance. Demon blood is somewhat addictive, and every day for a week after a user stops daily doses of the ichor, he must make a DC 15 Fortitude save to avoid taking 1 point of Wisdom damage and being sickened for the entire day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, desecrate; Cost 400 gp
